passageTemplate:
Dear Staff,

We are pleased to announce that our office will (1)___ to a new location on 5F, Taipei 101 starting next Monday. Please make sure all personal belongings are (2)___ by Friday afternoon. The new office (3)___ more meeting rooms and a larger pantry area. If you have any questions, (4)___ contact the HR department.

Best regards,
Admin Team

blanks.explanation: 主詞will後接原形動詞，表示未來式。
be動詞+過去分詞構成被動語態，符合「物品被打包」的語意。
主詞office為第三人稱單數，現在簡單式動詞需加s。
承接祈使句語氣，please最自然銜接「請聯絡」。

passageTemplate:
To: All Employees
From: Administration
Date: June 15

Starting next week, the company cafeteria will extend its operating hours (1)___ 11:00 a.m. to 2:30 p.m. This change was made to reduce crowding during peak lunch time. Employees are encouraged to (2)___ their lunch breaks between these hours to avoid long waiting lines. Please note that outside food deliveries (3)___ not be allowed in the main lobby after 1:00 p.m.

(4)___ you have any dietary restrictions or special requests, please inform the cafeteria manager by this Friday.

blanks.explanation: from...to...表示時間範圍起迄，為標準搭配。
encourage someone to + 原形動詞不定詞，故用take。
will not表示未來將不允許；應理解整句為公告未來規定。
條件句引導詞If最適合，表示「如果有飲食限制請告知」。

passageTemplate:
Attention all department heads,

A mandatory training workshop will be held on July 10 at the downtown conference center. The workshop (1)___ on effective communication and team collaboration skills. All managers are required to attend the full-day session, (2)___ starts at 9:00 a.m. and ends at 4:30 p.m. Please (3)___ your registration before June 30 to secure a seat.

(4)___ unable to attend due to urgent business, please notify the training coordinator as soon as possible.

blanks.explanation: 介紹workshop未來的主題方向，用未來式will focus最合適。
關係代名詞which引導非限定子句，修飾先行詞session（事物）。
祈使句please後接原形動詞complete。
For those後可省略who are，為公告常見簡潔寫法，表「針對無法出席者」。

passageTemplate:
Dear Team,

I am writing to inform you that the weekly project meeting has been (1)___ from Wednesday to Thursday this week. The change is (2)___ a scheduling conflict with the client presentation. The meeting room will remain the same, but please note that the starting time has been moved (3)___ 30 minutes earlier. If you cannot attend the rescheduled meeting, (4)___ send me an email by Tuesday evening.

Regards,
Project Manager

blanks.explanation: has been + 過去分詞構成現在完成被動語態。
due to + 名詞（scheduling conflict）表示原因，為正確片語。
move up表示提前，為動詞片語固定搭配。
if條件句後接祈使句please為email常用禮貌請求語氣。

passageTemplate:
Building Management Notice

Please be informed that the underground parking lot will be closed for maintenance (1)___ October 5 to October 7. During this period, all vehicles must be (2)___ from the premises by 8:00 p.m. on October 4. We (3)___ apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. Alternative parking is available at the public lot (4)___ across the street.

Thank you for your cooperation.

blanks.explanation: from...to...表示一段時間的起迄，為公告常見句型。
must be + 過去分詞構成被動語態，表示車輛「必須被移走」。
副詞sincerely修飾動詞apologize；sincere為形容詞，sincerity為名詞。
過去分詞located當形容詞修飾lot，相當於which is located的簡化。

passageTemplate:
NOW HIRING: Customer Service Representative

We are looking for a friendly and (1)___ individual to join our customer support team. The ideal candidate should have at least one year of experience in a similar role and be able to communicate (2)___ in both English and Mandarin. Responsibilities include answering customer inquiries, processing orders, and (3)___ complaints in a professional manner.

To apply, please send your resume to hr@abccorp.com. (4)___ will be contacted for an interview within one week of their application.

blanks.explanation: 形容詞enthusiastic與friendly並列修飾名詞individual；enthusiasm為名詞。
副詞effectively修飾動詞communicate；effective為形容詞，effect為名詞。
與answering, processing並列，皆用動名詞作介系詞的受詞。
複數主詞與後文will be contacted一致；語意上合適的應徵者整體。

passageTemplate:
Dear Mr. Chen,

Thank you for your recent order. This email is to confirm that your order #8823 has been (1)___ and is currently being prepared for shipment. Your items are expected to be (2)___ within three to five business days. The shipping cost has been calculated (3)___ on the total weight of your package.

(4)___ the shipment has been dispatched, you will receive a tracking number via email.

Sincerely,
Customer Service Team

blanks.explanation: has been + 過去分詞構成現在完成被動語態，表示「已收到」。
be expected to be + 過去分詞，被動不定詞表示「預計被送達」。
has been calculated based on為被動語態+過去分詞形容詞片語。
As soon as引導時間子句表示「一...就...」，為訂單通知常見說法。

passageTemplate:
To: All Staff
From: IT Department

This is to notify you that the company's server system will undergo maintenance this Saturday, June 22, from 6:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. During this time, all network services (1)___ temporarily unavailable. Please save all your work and (2)___ out of your accounts before leaving on Friday.

The upgrade is expected to (3)___ the overall system performance and reduce downtime significantly. If you experience any technical issues after the upgrade, (4)___ contact the IT help desk immediately.

blanks.explanation: 未來時間during this time需要未來式will be來表示將出現的狀態。
save and log out為祈使句並列，兩者皆用原形動詞。
be expected to + 原形動詞不定詞，improve為正確形式。
祈使句please銜接最為直接自然，為公告標準語氣。

passageTemplate:
Dear Colleagues,

We are excited to announce that this year's company picnic will take place (1)___ Saturday, August 17, at Yangmingshan National Park. Buses will depart from the office (2)___ 8:30 a.m. sharp. Lunch and refreshments will be provided, and there will be various outdoor activities for everyone to enjoy.

Family members are (3)___ to join the event. Please RSVP by August 5 so that we can make (4)___ arrangements for transportation and catering.

We look forward to seeing you there!

blanks.explanation: 特定日期Saturday用介係詞on；in用於月份/年，at用於時間點。
特定時間點8:30 a.m.用介係詞at。
are welcome to join（歡迎參加）為固定用法，welcome為形容詞。
形容詞necessary修飾名詞arrangements；necessity為名詞。

passageTemplate:
Dear Ms. Lin,

Your travel expense report for last month's business trip to Singapore has been (1)___. However, we noticed that the receipt for the hotel accommodation is missing. Please submit the (2)___ receipt as soon as possible so that we can process your reimbursement.

Kindly note that all reimbursements must be (3)___ within 30 days of the travel date. (4)___ additional questions regarding the reimbursement policy, please refer to the employee handbook or contact the finance department.

Best regards,
Finance Team

blanks.explanation: has been + 過去分詞構成現在完成被動語態，表示「已被審查」。
形容詞missing修飾名詞receipt，表示「缺少的收據」。
must be + 過去分詞構成被動語態，表示「必須被提交」。
條件句If you have...引導，為email常見句型。

passageTemplate:
FIRE DRILL NOTICE

A fire drill will be conducted on Tuesday, September 10, at 2:00 p.m. (1)___ the fire alarm sounds, all employees must evacuate the building immediately using the nearest emergency exit. Do not use the elevators (2)___ the drill. Please assemble at the designated meeting point in the parking lot and wait for further (3)___ from the safety officer.

The drill is expected to last approximately 20 minutes. (4)___ cooperation is appreciated and will help ensure everyone's safety in a real emergency.

blanks.explanation: When引導時間副詞子句表示「當警報響起時」，最直接合理。
during + 名詞（the drill）表示「演習期間」，比while（需接子句/分詞）更合適。
further instructions（進一步指示）為名詞片語，作wait for的受詞。
所有格Your修飾名詞cooperation；You為主格代名詞，Yours為所有格代名詞。

passageTemplate:
BUSINESS ENGLISH COURSE — ENROLL NOW!

Are you looking to improve your English skills for the workplace? Our 12-week Business English program is designed (1)___ for working professionals who want to communicate more confidently in meetings, presentations, and negotiations. Classes are held twice a week (2)___ the evening to accommodate busy schedules.

Each course includes practical exercises, role-play activities, and (3)___ feedback from experienced instructors. Upon completion, participants will receive a certificate that can be added (4)___ their professional portfolio.

Register by August 31 and receive a 15% early-bird discount!

blanks.explanation: 副詞specifically修飾designed，表示「特別針對」；specific為形容詞。
in the evening（在晚間）為固定搭配；on用於特定日期，at用於時間點。
形容詞personalized修飾名詞feedback，表示「個人化的回饋」。
add to（加入、增添到）為動詞片語固定搭配。
